title: Statistics papers
summary: This is an index/landing page for the ECB Statistics Paper Series, a repository for methodological work on central banking statistics. The page contains no specific papers, data releases, or macro catalyst content—it is purely navigational metadata describing the publication series and submission guidelines.
key_points: The Statistics Paper Series (SPS) publishes methodological work on statistics relevant to central banks
Content covers conceptual issues, new statistical topics, and techniques for improving comparability and quality of statistics
Papers are published in the name of authors; views do not necessarily reflect ECB official positions
Availability is online only; no specific papers or publications are listed on this page
No published date, headline data, or policy-relevant content present on this landing page
why_it_matters: This source is not directly actionable for market research. It is a directory/index page with no specific macro catalyst content, data releases, or policy signals. Any research value would require drilling into individual papers listed under this series.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page; source must be rejected per Core Rule 5
